content:
::ETCETER4 [ARTIST ID PROFILE]
> ROLE: Audio creator, performer
> PROJECTS: ::LOCREANCE, ::ET4L (label shell), ::FLOAT1NG.P01NTS (audio threads)
> FORMAT: Experimental pop, sound design
> OUTPUTS: Albums, audio rituals, live shows, generative voicework



⸻

IV. | USE CASES + FILTERS

Each Artist ID can:
• Produce multiple projects
• Hold tone/style/perspective
• Act as filter for output logic (e.g. “if ETCETER4 = sound logic”)

Each Project:
• Has one or more artist IDs attached
• Can shift logic mode (Dream vs Reality)
• Is treated as both output & input (can spawn other works)

⸻
